c.d: The level of active user participation and interaction within the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users (DAU), monthly active users (MAU), and average session length.
c.s: App Annie, Sensor Tower, App Store and Google Play Store Analytics

c.d: The overall quality of the live streaming experience, including video resolution, frame rate, and latency.
c.s: User reviews, Expert reviews, Technical benchmarks

c.d: The diversity and breadth of content available on the platform, including categories such as gaming, music, talk shows, and more.
c.s: App descriptions, User-generated tags, Content analysis reports

c.d: The availability and effectiveness of monetization features, such as virtual gifts, subscriptions, and ad revenue sharing.
c.s: App feature lists, Monetization case studies, Developer documentation

c.d: The design and usability of the app, including ease of navigation, accessibility features, and overall user satisfaction.
c.s: User reviews, UI/UX design awards, Expert critiques
